title: Between Two Worlds
content: Lông Bông Studio began as a bridge between the vibrant heritage of Poland and the futuristic clarity of Singapore. Our journey started in a small workshop where we debated the intersection of organic form and digital precision.

title: The Art of Wandering
content: 'Lông Bông' translates to wandering or drifting with no fixed destination. In our creative process, this means allowing ideas to evolve naturally, following curiosity rather than conventions.

title: Digital Tactility
content: As we moved into 3D motion and immersive web, our mission remained: to make the digital feel tangible. We treat pixels like clay, sculpting environments that invite touch even across a screen.
